summary: Jongno's 2020 contest was a heavyweight matchup: 이낙연 (DPK, future PM nominee) vs 황교안 (UFP leader, former PM). Lee won 58.38% — a clear DPK margin. Bellwether status drew national attention; Lee resigned the seat in Sept 2021 to pursue the presidential race.

issues.label: Heavyweight candidate matchup
issues.description: Both candidates were former Prime Ministers; race attracted maximum national media coverage.

issues.label: Pro-Moon national mood
issues.description: COVID-19 handling boosted Moon administration approval; Jongno's bellwether status amplified the wave.

issues.label: Bellwether attention effect
issues.description: '정치 1번지' status concentrates national attention and may amplify wave effects.
